entryNotice.title: Please review these terms before using the website
entryNotice.description: The information published on the AVIKONTEX website regarding products, technical specifications, pricing, availability, delivery, and related services is provided for general informational purposes only. The materials displayed on the website do not by themselves constitute an unconditional acceptance of a transaction, a guaranteed reservation of stock, or a final commercial commitment by the company. Any order, request, or inquiry submitted through the website is subject to review and confirmation by an authorized representative of AVIKONTEX.

sections.title: Product information
sections.body: AVIKONTEX makes reasonable efforts to keep product descriptions, images, technical parameters, product configuration, and other catalog data current and accurate. However, certain items may be updated by manufacturers, replaced with equivalent models, or supplied with revised specifications without prior publication on the website. Product visuals are illustrative unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: Pricing and availability
sections.body: Prices shown on the website may be changed without prior notice due to supplier terms, logistics costs, exchange-rate fluctuations, or other commercial factors. Product availability is confirmed only after the company reviews the request or order. The placement of an item in the cart or the submission of an order form does not guarantee immediate availability or fixation of price.

sections.title: Order confirmation
sections.body: After a request or order is submitted, a company representative may contact the customer to confirm the selected items, availability, final pricing, payment terms, delivery conditions, documentation requirements, and other essential details. A transaction is considered finalized only after these terms have been expressly confirmed by both parties.

sections.title: Delivery and timelines
sections.body: Estimated delivery periods shown on the website are indicative and may vary depending on warehouse stock, supplier lead times, customs procedures, transportation schedules, and the customer’s location. AVIKONTEX reserves the right to clarify or revise delivery timing during the order confirmation process.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By continuing to use the website, browsing the catalog, submitting a request, or placing an order, the user confirms that they have reviewed this notice, understand the nature of the information published on the website, and accept that final commercial terms are established only after direct confirmation from AVIKONTEX.

entryNotice.checkbox: I have read these terms and understand that the order is finalized only after confirmation

about.title: About AVIKONTEX
about.description: AVIKONTEX is focused on supplying clinical technologies, diagnostics, and medical equipment. The website provides fast selection, cart, and order flow for clinics.
about.card1Text: Reliable products suited for clinical practice with clearly listed technical parameters.
about.card2Text: Specialist support for selection, delivery, and commissioning.
about.card3Text: Quick access to 6,000+ products by category and price.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about the store and orders.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Add the product to the cart, go to the checkout page, enter your contact and address details, and confirm the order.
At the moment, cash on delivery and bank transfer are available. Online payment integration will be added in the next stage.

items.q: Can I track my order status?
items.a: Yes. After the order is confirmed, an order number is generated and the tracking page becomes available.
In Tashkent it is usually delivered the same day or the next day. For other regions, it takes 2-4 business days.

items.q: What happens if a product is out of stock?
items.a: Out-of-stock products are marked separately and cannot be added to the cart.

faq.noResults: No questions found for this filter.
faq.helpDescription: Our team can help with orders, delivery, and product questions.

p1.name: Portable ultrasound scanner X8
p1.description: A high-precision ultrasound device for small clinics and mobile diagnostic teams.
p1.material: Digital B/W and Color Doppler technology

p2.name: Digital X-ray sensor DR17
p2.description: Flat-panel X-ray sensor with fast capture and low radiation exposure.

p3.name: Bedside patient monitor PM10
p3.description: Continuously tracks heart rhythm, SpO2, NIBP, and respiration at the bedside.

p4.name: ICU multiparameter monitor MP12
p4.description: Advanced monitoring and alarm functions for intensive care departments.
p4.material: Extended EtCO2, IBP, and Temp modules

p5.name: Hematology analyzer HA320
p5.description: Stable and fast laboratory device for blood samples with 3-part differential analysis.

p6.name: Biochemistry analyzer BA200
p6.description: Compact system designed for high-throughput biochemical testing.

p7.name: Electrosurgical unit ESU-400
p7.description: Provides safe electrosurgery with coagulation and cutting modes.

p8.name: LED surgical light SkyLED
p8.description: Professional operating light system with shadow-free illumination and high color rendering.
p8.material: Multi-segment LED module and sensor control

p9.name: Plasma sterilizer PS60
p9.description: Safe low-temperature sterilization for delicate medical instruments.

p10.name: Autoclave Class B 23L
p10.description: Sterilizes medical instruments under pressure according to clinical standards.

p11.name: Rehabilitation treadmill RT5
p11.description: Supportive treadmill for physiotherapy and mobility recovery programs.

p12.name: CPM knee therapy device KM2
p12.description: Helps restore knee joints with passive motion after surgery.
